title: Is it possible to create a new user using API?
excerpt: Is it possible to create a new user using API?

posts.author: etaileers (Etai Leers)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to create a new user using API?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @etaileers,

As of now, our API does not support creating a new user through the API. You can, however, use the API to add users to a board, add users to a workspace, or delete users from a workspace. Here’s the doc for reference.

Please reach out with any other questions!

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: You can now invite users using the API! Users
